detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 專題研究(一) (Directed Research I)	開課班級 : 應英三年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 蘇淑品,羅主恩	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
This course aims to help students complete a project of their topic throughout this semester. Survey (using questionnaires) is introduced, among other methods, to collect the data on (but not limited to) second language (L2) research. Students will learn to ask their questions, construct and administer the questionnaires, process the data, and write up a well-organized English paper. 


2.教學綱要
This course aims to help students complete a project of their topic throughout this semester. Survey (using questionnaires) is introduced, among other methods, to collect the data on (but not limited to) second language (L2) research. Students will learn to ask their questions, construct and administer the questionnaires, process the data, and write up a well-organized English paper.
